upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tasmin rAjA praDArayet (daRqamiti SezaH)
'pareRApakfto rAjA tasmAtsamyak praDArayet' (BA॰SAM॰267.10) daRqaM praRayed daRqaM nipAtayedityarTaH
'vaDAya karRAtmajasyATa manaH pradaDre' (BA॰karRa॰85.29) daDa ityeva paryAptam anyatra bahutra mano daDa iti darSanAt vyavasasAvityarTaH

sapta yA DAraRAH kftsnA vAgyataH pratipadyate pfzWataH pASvataScAnyAstAvatyo vE praDAraRAH.. praSabdo viprakarzamAha yaTA pravAsa ityatra yaTA vA praSizyaH prapOtra ityatra vyavahitA DAraRAH praDAraRAH
'(mahAKyAnaM) loke bahuDA praDAritam (BA॰u॰123.23) nAnASAstrayuktyAdiBirniScitam
'tasyopakaraRaM pramARaM praharaRaM praDAraRamavaDAraRaM ca KarapawwAdAgamayet' (kO0 a0 4824) praDAraRaM niScayanam
'arEH sanDAryate nABiH' (paYcata॰1.81) DAryata ityevArTaH nArTaH samA
'gatAsUnapi saMSuzkAn BUmiH sanDArayizyati' (BA॰anu॰85.32)
'kaTaM sA kuSacIrARi gAtrEH sanDArayizyati' (rA॰gore॰saM॰.2.6215) sanDArayizyati=sahizyate
'yaH satataM paripfcCati SfRoti sanDArayatyaniSam' (paYcata॰5.78) sanDArayati=pratisanDatte=smarati
'yAvat sanDArayAmyaham' (mArka॰pu॰8.52) yAvad Driye yAvajjIvAmItyAha
'yaTA hi govfzo varzaM sanDArayati KAtpatat BImastaTA droRamuktaM SaravarzamadInavat' (BA॰BIzma॰96.32).. sanDArayati=sahate
'drOpadImArzwizeRAya sampracArya' (BA॰vana॰161.3) sampracArya=samarpya dattvA
'sanDArayitumAtmAnaM na SaSAka narottamaH sItAviyogaje duHKe magnaH…' (rA॰3.67.3).. AtmAnaM sanDArayitum=fjunA kAyenAvasTAtum
'anAryamAryakarmARamAryaM cAnAryakarmiRam sampraDAryAbravId DAtA na samO nAsamAviti' (manu॰10.73).. sampraDArya=tolayitvA tayorgurulAGavaM vicintya
'sampraDArya mahArAja yatkzemaM tat samAcara' (BA॰saBA॰46.24) sampraDArya sADutvAsADutve balAbalacintAM kftvA idamiha sampraDAryam iti vyAkaraRamahABAzye'nekatra arTastu pUrvoktAdaBinnaH
'eBireva dattADikArEH sArDaM sampraDArayatu BavAn' (tantrA0 3upakrame) mantrayatAm vimfSatu cintayatu ityAha
'sampraDAraRA tu samarTanam' (amaraH) samarTanaM cintanam yuktAyuktaparIkzA idamiha sampraDAryamityanekatra vyAkaraRamahABAzye
'dozARAM guRAnAM ca sampraDArya balAbalam' (rA0 3352) anAryamAryakarmARamAryaM cAnAryakarmiRam
'sampraDAryAbravId DAtA na samO nAsamAviti' (manu0 1073)..
